title: DUMPSTER BEAR
blurb: Behind Lazzaro's. Sanitation called it a 'big raccoon.' The shift super hasn't been to work in three days. Bring the revolver and the matches.
briefing: The dumpster behind Lazzaro's deli is breathing. The Pawnbroker hands you the revolver — six rounds, one for the head when you're sure it's dead. The thing inside has been eating long enough that it has forgotten what it used to be. Burn the work order on the way home.
epigraph: "You put six rounds into it and one more into its head when you are sure it is dead, because you are not sure it is dead."
